title: [Harbor Bistro, Dining Room]
description: Sunlight streams in from the two large windows, brightly illuminating this cheery room.  Painted a sunny yellow, the walls sport several ebonwood-framed landscapes done in oil paint or watercolor.  Smooth, oak floorboards of varying hues lay catercorner to each other in a lovely mosaic design.  Several tables lay host to patrons, while a wooden door leads deeper into the cafe.  Delicious scents linger in the air, as food is being served to the various tables by sure-footed serving staff.

Candlelight flickers from strategically placed golden candelabras, shedding their glow on this cozy room.  Painted a sunny yellow, the walls sport several ebonwood-framed landscapes done in oil paint or watercolor.  Smooth, oak floorboards of varying hues lay catercorner to each other in a lovely mosaic design.  Several tables lay host to patrons, while a wooden door leads deeper into the cafe.  Delicious scents linger in the air, as food is being served to the various tables by sure-footed serving staff.

wayto.28498: ;e table = "bee-eater"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
